---
title: "QMC Software Packages"
---

This page lists software packages related to quasi-Monte Carlo methods.

Please send updates or additions with the package name, URL, programming language, status, and preferred contact to [Fred Hickernell](mailto:hickernell@illinoistech.edu).


```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import runpy

helper = runpy.run_path("../qmcsoftware/scripts/qmc_software_table.py")

helper["render_qmc_software_table"](
    data_path="../qmcsoftware/data/qmc-software.yml",
    mode="web",
)
```
